case_title: CLERVI MARBLE COMPANY VS. CHARLIE KEEN et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-23-2008 CONTINUED TO AUG-08-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-17-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-08-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-17-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLERVI MARBLE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT KEEN, CHARLIE DBA KEEN CONSTRUCTION DOES 1 TO 24 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-23-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-24-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-08-2008
NOTICE OF CONTINUING CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY PLTF
